meta-description: Learn about riders and exclusionary riders by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Rider (exclusionary rider)
excerpt: A rider is an amendment to an insurance policy. Some riders add coverage (for example, if you buy a maternity rider to add coverage for pregnancy to your policy).
content: A rider is an amendment to an insurance policy. Some riders add coverage (for example, if you buy a maternity rider to add coverage for pregnancy to your policy).
